assertion_results.message: all active nodes advertise the minimum active address
every ancestry contains unique stable node IDs
no active node retains a superseded root at quiescence
every transmitted per-peer announcement obeys the configured boundary
parent, root, and ancestry columns agree
all transmitted bytes are delivered or deterministically lost
requested, coalesced, cancelled, constructed, serialized, queued, and rejected totals reconcile
per-edge transmitted bytes equal delivered plus lost bytes
event order is a stable virtual-time and ordinal total order
Bloom requests, coalescing, construction, sends, rejections, and bytes reconcile
ledger layers equal displayed totals and message/edge/depth/resource projections reconcile
cache invalidation remains bounded by inserted coordinate entries
valid control traffic does not starve every useful flow
every executed modeled work item has a causal resource receipt

samples.fidelity_statement: Wire evidence uses executable production codec; protocol fidelity is individually modeled semantic state; compute fidelity is operation-counted compute; scale uses individual nodes across 16 represented nodes; Bloom fidelity uses exact Bloom bits. No approximation metadata applies.
